title: March UI
description: A sleek, modern UI redesign mod for Minecraft that is minimalist and intuitive while adding additional quality client-side features.
body:
# March UI
March UI is not just a simple UI mod, or anything similar to the countless resource packs that reskin the game. This mod takes Minecraft, and redesigns its interface into a modern masterpiece. **Now available in Alpha with limited features.**

March UI is large in size due to the high-definition assets used.

![Homepage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d05b3c68b15691e408569cf4d4c786e2430db45_0.webp)

![World Selector](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13ff7061960be17459a0186d99942ca5766b7157_0.webp)

## Currently Implemented Features

### Title Screen
A beautiful, minimalist home screen welcomes you to the game. All buttons are enhanced by subtle hover effects. The classic panorama is replaced with an atmospheric background video that loops seamlessly. You can also choose to use a high-quality still, or the Vanilla panorama.

### In-game HUD
![HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6375551c7a7cfe9f541351f3ef48597c172b9d3_0.webp)
The in-game HUD has support for all vanilla HUD elements. Also included is a saturation bar. Bars blink when holding an associated armor item/food to show possible restoration. Aditionally, March UI offers a dynamic minimap, as well as a compass.

### Pause Screen
The pause screen offers a moment of tranquility with a darkened overlay and backdrop blur.

### Level Selection & Multiplayer Screen
These screens differ more from the vanilla experience, with each entry listed on the right, and the contextual options displayed on the left. Each world now offers a subtle hover and selection effect.

### World Load Screen
The world load screen provides an eased progress bar with the same Title Screen background of your choosing.

## Partially Implemented Features
- An option to keep the vanilla fonts and textured feel
- Settings Screen
- Advancements Screen

## Coming Soon to March UI
- Mod Menu integration
- In-game screens (containers, etc.)
- Better font support with other languages

## Incompatible Mods
- AppleSkin - Functionality Replaced
- Various Minimap Mods - Functionality Partially Replaced
